# Ankura Consulting Group University Intern - Ankura.AI Labs Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Ankura Consulting Group University Intern - Ankura.AI Labs internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Virginia
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Ankura Consulting Group
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Ankura Consulting Group is offering a University Intern - Ankura.AI Labs internship position in Virginia. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Ankura Consulting Group's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Ankura Consulting Group interview and increase your chances of success.
